# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/issues/1349
# repo: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
# title: RuntimeError: "LayerNormKernelImpl" not implemented for 'Half'

# Last frames in traceback:
#   D:\SD 2.0\stable-diffusion-webui\venv\lib\site-packages\torch\nn\modules\module.py line 1130 in _call_impl
#   D:\SD 2.0\stable-diffusion-webui\venv\lib\site-packages\torch\nn\modules\module.py line 1130 in _call_impl
#   D:\SD 2.0\stable-diffusion-webui\venv\lib\site-packages\transformers\models\clip\modeling_clip.py line 316 in forward
#   D:\SD 2.0\stable-diffusion-webui\venv\lib\site-packages\torch\nn\modules\module.py line 1130 in _call_impl
#   D:\SD 2.0\stable-diffusion-webui\venv\lib\site-packages\torch\nn\modules\normalization.py line 189 in forward
#   D:\SD 2.0\stable-diffusion-webui\venv\lib\site-packages\torch\nn\functional.py line 2503 in layer_norm

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # **Describe the bug**
    # When I try to run any prompt in the webui, it shows me this message: "RuntimeError: "LayerNormKernelImpl" not implemente
    # **To Reproduce**
    # Steps to reproduce the behavior:
    # 1.Run webui-user.bat.
    # 2.Get webui link.
    # 3.Type prompt in txt2img and click generate.
    # 4.See error.
    raise RuntimeError('reproduce: see https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/issues/1349')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
